name: Dhanoosh
description: Adaptive policy layer that observes agent actions and user outcomes, computes effectiveness statistics, and provides scoring/ranking guidance.

mode.description: Operating mode: off (disabled), passive (observe only), advisory (prompt hints), active (suppress/allow).

aggregateIntervalMs.description: How often to recompute aggregate statistics (ms).

logRetentionDays.description: How many days to retain action/outcome logs.
